expect: gap-record returned immediately when no analytics data is provided
no fabricated metrics or benchmark presented as the creator's data

evals.prompt: Here is my YouTube Studio CSV export. What does it tell me?
expect: benchmark-compare runs per metric in the CSV
benchmark ranges are labeled as industry benchmarks, not the creator's personal data
data_quality reflects whether data is real or estimated

evals.prompt: I have view counts but no CTR or AVD data. What can you tell me?
expect: benchmark-compare returns unknown gap_assessment for missing metrics
flags list includes the missing metrics
